headline: TE Connectivity (TEL) Loses 7.89% on Middle East Supply Disruptions
summary: We recently published 10 Firms Facing a Rough March So Far. TE Connectivity PLC (NYSE:TEL) was one of the worst performers on Monday. TE Connectivity extended its losing streak to a third consecutive day on Monday, shedding 7.89 percent to finish at $211.98 apiece, as investors parked funds in a wait-and-see mode amid ongoing geopolitical […]
